arts.ttl: Liverpool make Van Dijk and Alexander-Arnold offers amid ‘UNCLEAR’ future
arts.sum: Liverpool have taken steps towards securing the future of Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold, David Ornstein has reported, with an offer for Mohamed Salah expected to follow soon. Liverpool are in the unsettling position of losing three of their biggest stars as free agents in the summer, with the trio of Van Dijk, Alexander-Arnold and Salah all out of contract at the end of June 2025.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's 800 million TV incentive against Liverpool
arts.sum: Shay Given hopes that Newcastle United can knock Liverpool off their perch in tonight's powder keg clash at St James' Park. But Given hopes that Newcastle's stars aren't daunted and see this game as an opportunity to pull off a scalp.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 'offer Virgil van Dijk a new deal and are expected to follow suit with Mo Salah soon' with key duo's contracts up at the end of the season
arts.sum: The defender is amongst a trio of Liverpool stars at risk of being allowed to leave the club for free with Van Dijk, Alexander-Arnold and Salah all having only a few months remaining on their deals.

arts.ttl: David Ornstein Reveals Liverpool Contract Offer to Anfield Superstar
arts.sum: Liverpool have three major stars out of contract at the end of the season and reports have suggested that one has finally been offered a new deal

arts.ttl: Eredivisie regular names similarities between Arne Slot and Francesco Farioli
arts.sum: Speaking with VI PRO, Owen Wijndal spoke of the similarities between former AZ boss Slot and his current Ajax manager Farioli.

arts.ttl: Trainer predicts big English offer for player – Liverpool’s Arne Slot ‘already fascinated’ by him
arts.sum: Two days ago, La Gazette du Fennec reported Liverpool manager Arne Slot is ‘already fascinated’ by Feyenoord’s Anis Hadj-Moussa. It was also stated Slot has included the 22-year-old in his target list for Liverpool, after wanting to manage him at the Eredivisie side. At the end of last season, the manager left Feyenoord for Liverpool. arts.ttl: Swap deal, transfer rejection, Anfield restructure - six events behind unforeseen Liverpool scenario
arts.sum: Liverpool are clear frontrunners in the Premier League title race ahead of Arsenal, Chelsea and Man City

arts.ttl: 19-year-old “aware” of Man United, Arsenal & Liverpool transfer interest
arts.sum: Juventus star Kenan Yildiz is reportedly aware of interest from Manchester United, Arsenal and Liverpool, among others. The talented 19-year-old looks like one of the most exciting prospects in Europe at the moment, and one imagines he’ll surely continue to be eyed up by top clubs in the Premier League if he continues to develop […] The post 19-year-old “aware” of Man United, Arsenal & Liverpool transfer interest appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'I was Liverpool star who made it to World Cup final – I dreamt of Arsenal but it didn’t happen'
arts.sum: Ryan Babel enjoyed four years at Liverpool after joining the club in 2007, but the Dutchman has admitted he would have loved to play for the Reds' rivals Arsenal

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique’s PSG and Barcelona decisions could push Donnarumma to Inter or Liverpool
arts.sum: Gigio Donnarumma spent three PSG games on the bench in November, and if Luis Enrique...
